title: AGENT.md Frontmatter
description: Schema for validating AGENT.md frontmatter in Skill-Hub

name.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for the agent

description.description: Short description of what the agent does

model.description: Preferred Claude model for the agent (e.g., claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-opus-4-6)

color.description: Color for the agent's status line indicator

scope.description: Where the agent can be installed

dependencies.description: Other extensions this agent depends on (format: type:name or just name for skills)

projects.description: Project identifiers this extension is designed for. Empty or absent means the extension is universal (works with any project). When a project is set in the user's config, extensions with a non-matching projects list are hidden from search and flagged as conflicting if installed.
